name: Sam's Grocery & Check Cashing
description_short: Sam's Grocery & Check Cashing offers check cashing and financial services at a Phoenix location, accessible through Grubhub for grocery delivery.
description_long:
Sam's Grocery & Check Cashing is a financial services business located at 3901 West Southern Avenue in Phoenix, Arizona. The company operates as a hybrid grocery store and check-cashing provider, combining everyday retail groceries with basic financial transaction services. The business maintains extended hours, operating from 7:00 AM to 11:00 PM daily for both pickup and delivery options.

The company offers check-cashing services as its primary financial offering, though the website content is limited to Grubhub's food delivery and pickup interface. This suggests their primary revenue stream may be grocery sales, with check-cashing as a complementary service. The business is listed on Grubhub as a food merchant rather than a traditional financial services platform, indicating accessibility through third-party delivery apps. Contact information is available via phone at (602) 237-3115 for direct inquiries about services beyond the online grocery ordering system.

The company distinguishes itself by combining grocery shopping with financial services in a single location, serving customers who need both everyday supplies and check-cashing functionality. The availability through Grubhub's platform with extended operating hours (7 AM–11 PM) provides customer convenience for those seeking flexible access to both grocery items and financial transactions. The business operates in Phoenix's South Valley area, serving a local community customer base.

A significant caveat is that the available website information is almost entirely limited to Grubhub's grocery ordering interface. Specific details about check-cashing fees, service limits, ID requirements, accepted check types, or other financial service details are not accessible from the provided content. Potential customers interested specifically in check-cashing services would need to contact the business directly, as the Grubhub listing emphasizes grocery sales and food delivery rather than financial services.
pros: Extended daily hours (7:00 AM–11:00 PM) provide flexible access for check-cashing needs
Integrated grocery store with check-cashing service allows one-stop shopping
Local South Phoenix location serves neighborhood residents directly
Available for both pickup and delivery through Grubhub platform
No service fees on Grubhub orders over $50
Contact-free delivery option available through Grubhub
cons: Grubhub listing emphasizes groceries, not check-cashing—financial service details unavailable online
Limited information about check-cashing fees, limits, or service terms on official web presence
No dedicated website or financial services-focused online platform visible
Check-cashing availability and hours may not align with stated 7 AM–11 PM grocery hours
No published information about accepted check types or identification requirements
best_for: Phoenix-area residents seeking check cashing combined with grocery shopping
Customers wanting flexible, extended-hours financial services
People preferring local, neighborhood-based financial service providers
diagnosis: Sam's Grocery & Check Cashing is best for Phoenix residents who need check-cashing services and want to combine that transaction with grocery shopping at an extended-hours location. The primary caveat is that specific check-cashing details—fees, limits, policies—are not documented on the company's web presence; customers must call (602) 237-3115 directly to confirm financial service offerings and terms.
